preflight.summary_text:
- img_1: acceptable quality
- img_2: acceptable quality

primary_output.evidence_standard_met_reason: Both images are clear and usable. img_1 shows the open box interior filled with crumpled newspaper packing material but no visible product. img_2 shows the sealed exterior of a package with intact tape and barcode label.
primary_output.claim_status_justification: img_1 shows an open box filled with crumpled newspaper packing material; no product is visible, but the packing material obscures the full interior — absence of item cannot be confirmed or denied with certainty. img_2 shows an intact sealed exterior, providing no evidence of tampering or opening. Missing contents cannot be visually verified from these images alone.
